creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rakuco
Date: Mon Jan 29 12:37:06 UTC 2018
New revision: 460296
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/460296

Log:
  Update Qt5 to 5.9.4.

  Announcement:
  https://blog.qt.io/blog/2018/01/23/qt-5-9-4-released/

  This is a minor update and a lot easier to land than the previous 5.7.1 ->
  5.9.3 commit.

  Thanks to antoine for the exp-run.

  PR:		225436

Changes:
  head/Mk/bsd.qt.mk
  head/devel/qt5/distinfo
  head/devel/qt5-core/pkg-plist
  head/devel/qt5-qmake/pkg-plist
  head/graphics/qt5-3d/pkg-plist
  head/misc/qt5-doc/Makefile
  head/misc/qt5-doc/distinfo
  head/misc/qt5-doc/pkg-plist
  head/misc/qt5-examples/distinfo
  head/misc/qt5-l10n/pkg-plist
  head/x11-toolkits/qt5-quickcontrols2/pkg-plist
